productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Melania Black Casual Shoes
description: This buckaroo Melania casual shoe is the essence of the brand's signature rugged style. True to its origin from the Mexican plains, this shoe references man-about-town nonchalance. This three-hole lace up shoe is a stylish take on the casual sport shoe while slim silhouetting on this low-top pair makes this an off-duty staple. Wear this with denims, a tee and a structured blazer, or with corduroy trousers.UpperFull grain leather upper for added durability and styleThree hole lace-up system for a snug, customized FitLightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fitLeather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dryWell-cushioned footbed for all-day comfortBrand logo embossed on lateral side of the heelPull loop at the heel collarMidsolePU midsole with shock absorbersOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant TPR outsole with patterned grooves for enhanced grip and tractionShoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
